name: argus-weekly-synthesis
prompt:
Run the weekly Argus synthesis now.

1. Read all daily scan files from the past 7 days in the Obsidian vault (wiki/synthesis/argus-scan-*.md). Also read any handoff files from wiki/inbox/ this week.
2. If fewer than 3 scan files exist, write a short Obsidian note about the gap and stop.
3. Identify: recurring signals (appeared 3+ days), the emerging theme for the week, score distribution (how many 5s, 4s, 3s), and the single best content angle.
4. Deliver the summary to Telegram via send_message.
5. Save the full synthesis to Obsidian at wiki/synthesis/argus-week-{YYYY-WNN}.md and append to wiki/log.md.
